task_completion.description: Create a route named 'Survey-Legs' connecting all waypoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route drawn on the map connecting the existing waypoints, and/or a layer/item list showing a route explicitly named 'Survey-Legs'.

task_completion.description: Create a waypoint named 'Resupply-Point' at the midpoint of the longest leg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new waypoint marker named 'Resupply-Point' positioned approximately halfway along the longest segment of the 'Survey-Legs' route.

task_completion.description: Generate a distance summary report with leg details, total distance, and longest leg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text document or report window containing distance measurements for individual legs, the total route distance, and text explicitly identifying the longest leg.

task_completion.description: Save the distance summary report to C:\workspace\output\distance_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file explorer window, or text editor title bar confirming the report is saved exactly as 'distance_report.txt' in the 'C:\workspace\output' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the route, original waypoints, and new waypoint to C:\workspace\output\resupply_plan.gpx
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export/save dialog in the GIS/mapping application or a file explorer window confirming the creation of 'resupply_plan.gpx' in the 'C:\workspace\output' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the mapping/GIS application's graphical interface to create the route and waypoint
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the mapping software's tools (e.g., route creation tool, waypoint tool) rather than writing a script in the terminal to generate the GPX file.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's measurement or properties tools to determine distances
integrity.visual_evidence: Check for screenshots showing the agent opening route properties, a measurement tool, or an elevation/distance profile to find the longest leg, rather than hallucinating the values.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export functionality to create the GPX file
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the GPX file was created via 'Save As' or 'Export' in the mapping software, rather than manually typing XML/GPX content in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report path is 'C:\workspace\output\distance_report.txt'. The expected GPX path is 'C:\workspace\output\resupply_plan.gpx'. The route must be named exactly 'Survey-Legs' and the new waypoint must be named exactly 'Resupply-Point'.
